channel.title: Meta on Tyler Burleigh, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Tyler Burleigh, PhD

item.title: Hello blogdown
item.description: I like to reinvent my website from time to time – clear it out and give it not just a new look-and-feel but also a new function and purpose. This time, I thought I would try blogdown. As James Somers put it in an article over at The Atlantic, The Scientific Paper is Obsolete. I’m interested in new ways of sharing science that improve transparency, accountability, and replicability. I’m also transitioning from academia to industry where there is less focus (if at all) on communicating scientific findings via peer-reviewed journals.
